# Storybook (`ci-storybook.yml`)

**Triggers**: `merge_group`, `pull_request`, `push`

```mermaid
graph TD
    classDef gate fill:#4a9eff,stroke:#2563eb,color:#fff
    classDef plumbing fill:#a78bfa,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    classDef test fill:#34d399,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
    classDef collation fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
    classDef sideeffect fill:#f87171,stroke:#dc2626,color:#fff

    changes{{"Determine need to run storybook checks"}}
    build-storybook["Build Storybook"]
    flake-verification["Storybook flake verification"]
    visual-regression["Visual regression tests - ... (.../...)<br/><i>matrix: include(20)</i>"]
    calculate-running-time(["Calculate running time"])
    handle-snapshots("Handle snapshot changes")
    snapshot-failure-comment("Post snapshot failure guidance")
    snapshot-success-cleanup("Clean up snapshot hint")
    visual_regression_tests[["Visual regression tests pass"]]

    changes -->|frontend| build-storybook
    build-storybook --> flake-verification
    changes -->|frontend| flake-verification
    build-storybook --> visual-regression
    changes -->|frontend| visual-regression
    changes -->|frontend| calculate-running-time
    visual-regression --> calculate-running-time
    changes -->|frontend| handle-snapshots
    visual-regression --> handle-snapshots
    changes --> snapshot-failure-comment
    visual-regression --> snapshot-failure-comment
    changes --> snapshot-success-cleanup
    visual-regression --> snapshot-success-cleanup
    handle-snapshots --> visual_regression_tests
    visual-regression --> visual_regression_tests

    class changes gate
    class build-storybook test
    class flake-verification test
    class visual-regression test
    class calculate-running-time plumbing
    class handle-snapshots sideeffect
    class snapshot-failure-comment sideeffect
    class snapshot-success-cleanup sideeffect
    class visual_regression_tests collation
```

## Legend

| Shape        | Color  | Meaning                   |
| ------------ | ------ | ------------------------- |
| Hexagon      | Blue   | Gate / change detection   |
| Stadium      | Purple | Plumbing / matrix builder |
| Rectangle    | Green  | Test / core work          |
| Subroutine   | Yellow | Collation / status gate   |
| Rounded rect | Red    | Side effect / snapshots   |

Edge labels show the change-detection output that gates the job.

## Job details

| Job                        | Depends on                          | Condition                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Matrix      |
| -------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `changes`                  | -                                   | github.event_name != 'merge_group'                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | -           |
| `build-storybook`          | changes                             | frontend                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | -           |
| `flake-verification`       | changes, build-storybook            | frontend && github.event_name == 'pull_request'                                                                                                                                                                                                      | -           |
| `visual-regression`        | changes, build-storybook            | frontend                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | include(20) |
| `calculate-running-time`   | visual-regression, changes          | github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]' && frontend && ( (github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == 'PostHog/posthog') \|\| (github.event_name != 'pull_request' && github.repository == 'PostHog/posthog')) | -           |
| `handle-snapshots`         | visual-regression, changes          | needs.changes.outputs.mode == 'update' && frontend && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository                                                                                                                             | -           |
| `snapshot-failure-comment` | visual-regression, changes          | needs.visual-regression.result == 'failure' && needs.changes.outputs.mode == 'check' && github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository                                                    | -           |
| `snapshot-success-cleanup` | visual-regression, changes          | needs.visual-regression.result == 'success' && github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository                                                                                             | -           |
| `visual_regression_tests`  | visual-regression, handle-snapshots | -                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | -           |
